name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent expense reporting causes reimbursement delays. We automate expense auditing instead of manual tracking and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: Inconsistent expense reporting and reimbursement delays
